productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Blue Grey White Checked Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves that have rolled cuffs, mock button denim panel detailing, plaid checks in blue, grey and white  with brown stitch detailing, tape on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, brand name on the upper left chest, appliqued patch on the top right chest, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this blue, grey and white plaid shirt shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
